questionHtml: State and explain the effect of the angular impulse on the body of the aeroplane.
markschemeHtml:
As the motor is internal, angular momentum is conserved (ignoring the torques due to resistive forces) ✓ 

The body of the plane will (try to) rotate in the opposite direction to the propellor ✓

meta.title: State and explain the effect of the angular impulse on the body of the aeroplane.
